features.name: urandom_range with full 32-bit max value
features.description: Code should include a $urandom_range call with maxval set to the full 32-bit unsigned value (32'hffffffff), where the return value is assigned to a 33-bit register

features.name: urandom_range with maxval exceeding signed 32-bit boundary
features.description: Code should include a $urandom_range call where maxval is 0x80000000 or higher, causing internal signed integer overflow in implementations that treat the range as signed
